I asked Anthony who he thought was better... :

I don't know Obrein however Penn had just completed a renovation for another owner in the building and I used him for the last two apartments I renovated. He did a good job. By odering some of the supplies directly and using our electrician we can also save. Let me know

Anthony Barrett
